song.title: Pride Around the World
song.keywords: pride around the world lyrics, pride anthem, dance pop, queer pride song, global pride
song.description: Full lyrics to 'Pride Around the World' from Lyrics by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

og.title: Pride Around the World Lyrics - Agust Islandia
og.description: Full lyrics to Pride Around the World. Global Pride energy, freedom, and dance-floor liberation.

twitter.title: Pride Around the World Lyrics - Agust Islandia
twitter.description: Boom, boom, boom — let's run free. Full official lyrics.

essay: Pride Around the World is a movement-driven Pride single centered on release, visibility, and collective momentum. The repeated "be free" hook is built for live spaces, Pride events, and dance-floor call-and-response.
song.lyricsHtml:
Lights up, we're alive, no fear tonight
Heartbeat wild, sky so wide, we ride, we ride
Boom, boom, boom, oh, let's run free
Boom, boom, boom, oh, let's fly free

Boom, boom, boom, oh, let's feel free
Boom, boom, boom, oh, let's be free
Boom, boom, boom, oh, let's run free
Boom, boom, boom, oh, let's fly free

Boom, boom, boom, oh, let's feel free
Boom, boom, boom, oh, let's be free
Feel this rhythm, oh
It's building, spinning, oh

We're navigating in the love
Your baby's spinning, oh
Come on and carry me, oh
One more time

Boom, boom, boom, oh, let's run free
Boom, boom, boom, oh, let's fly free
Boom, boom, boom, oh, let's feel free
Boom, boom, boom, oh, let's be free

Hands up
Higher
Wildfire
No walls, no chains

We break away
Boom, boom, boom, oh, let's run free
Boom, boom, boom, oh, let's fly free
Boom, boom, boom, oh, let's feel free

Boom, boom, boom, oh, let's be free
Boom, boom, boom, be free
Be free
Boom, boom, boom, be free

Be free
Yeah, be free
